summary:
[summary here]

Summary: The pulmonary artery contains the lowest oxygen content due to carrying fully deoxygenated blood from the right ventricle to the lungs. Unlike systemic veins such as the coronary sinus, it does not mix with oxygen-rich blood from the left side of the heart and maintains consistently low oxygen levels throughout the stress test.
